summary: Applied surgical seam edits to align Chapter 14's exit with Chapter 15's opening while preserving all existing beats, voice, and causality.
edits: Added an in-scene handoff where Eleanor writes the safe combination on a paper napkin in blue ink and folds it into Lena's palm.
Adjusted Lena's late-scene internal beat to reference the folded napkin in her pocket, matching the Chapter 15 carryover detail.
Specified Lena's final unit request as one trusted uniform on lobby and one on Pike's stairwell to seed the exact next-chapter deployment.
